responses.text: The mortality rate of suicide in Japan is higher than in other G7 countries Suicide ranked first among causes of death among 15-19 year olds in Japan

Many women in Japan are employed in casual or non-permanent jobs, making them more vulnerable to economic shocks. In October 2020, 879 women committed suicide in Japan, a 70% increase from the same month in 2019.

The number of people who committed suicide in Japan rose again last year for the first time in more than a decade. Around 20,919 people died by suicide in 2020, an increase of 3.7 percent from the previous year.

The social and economic consequences of the pandemic have also led to mental health problems for many Japanese. There are about 1,600 cases of pneumonia in Wuhan, but as many as 13,000 suicide deaths in Japan so far.

The suicide rate has broken the record of the past 11 years and increased for the first time. The proportion of women who have committed suicide due to financial distress caused by the loss of their jobs due to the epidemic has increased significantly.

The rate of female suicides in Japan has increased by about 15%. The suicide rate of women in Japan in October 2020 experienced an increase of more than 70% compared to the same month of the previous year.

Suicide rates in Japan have risen after a decade of declining declines with the COVID-19 epidemic. The number of people who committed suicide in Japan rose again last year for the first time in more than a decade.

The Palestinian people should use the historic agreement between Israel and the United Arab Emirates. Jared Kushner told Bloomberg TV that the Palestinian leadership should consider the benefits of their participation in the negotiations.

Palestinian leader Mahmoud Abbas refused to talk on the phone with US President Donald Trump about the settlement plan in the Middle East prepared by the US administration. Palestinian leader Mahmoud Abbas refused a telephone conversation with US President Donald Trump regarding the upcoming unveiling of the Trump administration ’ s peace plan.

Palestinian leaders will not allow the deal of the century to be implemented. Islamic, Arab and other countries have united to confront the deal of the century, act on international resolutions and the Arab Peace Initiative to form an independent Palestinian state centered on East Jerusalem on the 1967 borders.

Palestinian groups have signed the “Covenant of Honor ”, which includes agreement on all issues related to the Palestinian parliamentary election process. The Palestinian Islamic Jihad movement believes that it cannot be signed in the light of the acceptance of the Oslo Accords.

The Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine also said that the signing of a peace agreement between the United Arab Emirates and Israel is a betrayal and a new conspiracy. Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas called for an urgent meeting of Palestinian leaders to review the agreement between the United Arab Emirates and Israel.

Hamas leader Ismail Rezvan said the message of the Iranian leader showed strategic support for the Palestinian people. The Iranian leader emphasized the support of the Palestinian people and the resistance in his letter to Haniyeh.

Palestinian officials condemned the agreement to normalize relations between Israel and Bahrain, calling it a betrayal of the Palestinian cause. The normalization of relations between the Israeli occupation government and the Kingdom of Bahrain is considered a betrayal of Jerusalem, Al-Aqsa Mosque and the Palestinian cause.
37.5% of foreign patients go to cosmetic surgery and dermatology hospitals

Some clinics around the world say the number of cosmetic surgeries has increased during the coronavirus era. Cosmetic procedures have increased in clinics in the United States, Japan, South Korea and Australia during the Corona period.

To become a plastic and reconstructive surgeon, one must first obtain a general surgeon's degree, then a specialty in general surgery, and finally a subspecialty in plastic surgery. Correcting complications from unauthorized cosmetic surgeries can be costly and time-consuming.

A 21-year-old Jiangsu woman spent more than 100,000 yuan to perform breast augmentation, nose augmentation and M lip surgery at a cosmetic hospital in Changzhou, but died on the operating table. The cosmetic hospital involved was ordered to close down and rectification by the authorities after the incident was exposed.

The market for cosmetic surgeries in Iran is highly active, with many people seeking attention to their skin, face, beauty, and rejuvenation.  Both men and women in Iran are interested in cosmetic surgeries, with some paying huge amounts of money for these procedures.

New Taipei City Xindian District Qiaoren Park game area access lines are barrier-free and friendly design, and enjoy sufficient rest and leisure space. The entrance and exit routes of the Xindian District Qiaoren Park game venues in Xindian District of New Taipei City are barrier-free and friendly, and enjoy sufficient rest and leisure space.

The city built 47 pocket parks last year, and this year will build or upgrade 50. A small green space of only 500 square meters has been installed with three leisure seats and some small outdoor fitness equipment at the corner of Fuxing East Road and Zhonghua Road.

The movies and series that are broadcast through Turkish satellite networks have more themes and content of betrayal, lies, revenge and so on. Watching Turkish series and films does not produce anything other than bad education, deidentification of individuals, breaking the sanctity and weakening family relations among Iranians.

The forecast was previously made by Stratfor. By 2050, Turkey will expand its sphere of influence in the Balkans, North Africa, the Middle East, Transcaucasia, Central Asia, as well as part of Russia.
NASA’s Mars Rover “Perseverance” launched from Earth to the red planet last summer. The Mars Rover “Perseverance” managed to get oxygen from the atmosphere of Mars for the first time.

NASA employees for the first time received oxygen from the atmosphere of Mars, which is 96% carbon dioxide. The Pereverance rover, which has been exploring Mars since February, processed carbon dioxide into oxygen with the help of an experimental MOXIE spacecraft installed aboard the rover.

Bayer AG will announce that it has reached an approximately $10.5 billion agreement with plaintiffs in the United States who have accused its Roundup herbicide of causing cancer to settle tens of thousands of lawsuits. Bayer will pay about $9.5 billion to settle claims filed by lawyers representing some 95,000 plaintiffs.

German pharmaceutical company Bayer said its U.S. company Monsanto production of herbicide "Roundup" reported cases of cancer in the United States in the second quarter of about 5,000 new cases. Bayer lost all three related cases in which the complainant alleged that the carcinogenic ingredient Glyphosate was contained in Roundup.
Workers from the Italian city of Piacenza found a painting by Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a woman ”, which since 1997 was considered stolen.

French authorities have announced that the painting by Austrian artist Gustav Klimt will be returned to his legal heir because it was sold under Nazi Germany’s oppression. Klimt’s work “The Rose Under the Tree” was owned by Nora Stiasny, a member of the well-known Jewish family in Austria before World War II, and was inherited from his industrialist and art collector uncle.
The content of carbon dioxide in the Earth's atmosphere has reached a record level
Agriculture is the most affected by climate change

The Berlin Film Festival, along with the Venice and Cannes Film Festival, is considered one of the most important film festivals in the world. "Evil Does Not Exist", the latest feature by Iranian director Mohammad Rasoulof, competes with 17 other films in the Berlinale competition for the festival's main awards, including the Golden Bear for the best film.

The Iranian film “There Is No Evil” won the Golden Bear Award for Best Picture. Mohammad Rasoulof, the director of “There Is No Evil”, was prevented from receiving the award by the Iranian authorities.

Last September, British sources reported a record 86 people migrating through the English Channel in a single day. The British and French governments have taken special measures to tackle illegal crossings, but Paris has refused to accept migrants who have crossed the border.

French naval and shipping officials said the British coast guard had rescued more than 120 migrants trying to cross the English Channel in seven small boats. The French and British coastguards have repeatedly intercepted boats attempting to transport Asian and African migrants across the English Channel to Britain.
The test of the Stratolaunch aircraft passed successfully
The Stratolaunch aircraft is the largest in the world The wingspan of the Stratolaunch aircraft reaches 117 m
A fan caused a massive drop in the first stage of the Tour de France 2021. The Tour de France organizers filed an official complaint against the fan who caused the crash.

French police are searching for a woman whose carelessness made headlines during the Tour de France. The spectator entered the path of the cyclists with a placard in his hand, and as a result, many athletes crashed and fell to the ground in the first round.
SpaceX launches human spaceship to open space commercialization era

US private space exploration technology company SpaceX and the US Space Agency (NASA) successfully launched the Crew Dragon Falcon-9 rocket on May 30, carrying two American astronauts into space. The Dragon successfully docked with the International Space Station at about 10 pm local time on Sunday (31st), nineteen hours after launch.

The Iranian Foreign Ministry rejected the verdict of the Supreme Court of Ontario in Canada. Four survivors of the victims of Flight 752 have filed a public complaint against the Islamic Republic in Ontario, along with a person who did not want to be named.
The shooting of Ukrainian flight PS752 by Iran killed 176 people. Ukraine International Airlines Flight 752 was hit by two Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps missiles in January 2020.

A Russian fishing vessel suspected of mechanical failure, including its engine, drifted to the North Korean coast and is being detained by the North Korean authorities. South Korea is keeping the North Korean and Russian authorities informed of the incident.

The boat had not broken any laws according to the Russian embassy. The 15 Russian sailors and two South Korean crew members aboard the boat were detained by the North Korean coast guard and held in a hotel in Wonsan.

Japanese whaling vessels have killed hundreds of whales each year in the name of scientific research, even during the period when commercial whaling has been banned since 1986. Eating whale meat is Japan's traditional food culture, according to Japan's agriculture, forestry and fisheries officials.

Japan has announced its withdrawal from the International Whaling Commission (IWC) and will resume commercial whaling in July 2019. The International Whaling Commission has banned commercial whaling since 1986 due to some whale species being endangered.
The article references Ernest Miller, Hemingway.

China is contributing to the International Thermonuclear Experimental Reactor (ITER) project in southern France, along with other countries. China is accelerating its own pace of development, with the goal of designing a fully fledged fusion reactor capable of generating electricity.

The ITER demonstration reactor is being built near the Cadarache Research Center in southern France, jointly by the European Union, Russia, China, India, Japan, South Korea and the United States. The ITER project will be the first large-scale attempt to show the possibility of using a thermonuclear reaction to generate energy on an industrial scale.
